project.name: gogomail
project.description: High-performance Go mail server — SMTP/IMAP/CalDAV/CardDAV — targeting national-scale deployments

exceptions.description: Before creating apps/shell, apps/webmail, apps/admin, or shared UI packages

rules.description: Production code changes (internal/*.go excl _test.go, migrations/*.sql) require at least one docs/ file staged

task_structure.description: Agent reads ACTIVE_TASK.md only. After commit, advances to next backlog item.

steps: update docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md, docs/backend-roadmap.md, openapi.yaml as needed
update docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md acceptance checklist to fully checked
git add (code + tests + docs), git commit
git push origin main (only if go test ./... passes)
advance docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md to next backlog item from docs/NEXT_STEPS.md
blocked_by: ambiguous-acceptance-criteria — stop and describe blocker in ACTIVE_TASK.md

commit_rules.co_author: must not add AI co-author lines unless user requests

domain_rules.protocol_product_separation: enforced — no spam/product logic in SMTP core
domain_rules.library_over_adhoc: use well-maintained libraries for protocol parsing, no ad-hoc string parsing

change_history.change: initial bootstrap — test-gated push, strict pre-commit hook, ACTIVE_TASK.md single-task pattern, Korean communication
